props.name: aria-label
props.description: Use an aria label to describe the functionality of the button. Please refer to [our guidance on alt text](https://primer.style/guides/accessibility/alternative-text-for-images) for tips on writing good alternative text.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: ID of the element that labels the button.

props.name: variant
props.description: Determines the styles on a button, one of 'default' | 'primary' | 'invisible' | 'danger' | 'link'

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the button and fontSize of the text in the button

props.name: block
props.description: Allow a button to fill its container horizontally

props.name: loading
props.description: Specify whether the button is in a loading state

props.name: loadingAnnouncement
props.description: The content to announce to screen readers when loading

props.name: inactive
props.description: Whether the button looks visually disabled, but can still accept all the same interactions as an enabled button.

props.name: labelWrap
props.description: Whether the button label should wrap to multiple lines if it is longer than the button width

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon rendered inside the button.

props.name: unsafeDisableTooltip
props.description: Disable the default tooltip for the icon button.

props.name: description
props.description: Text used as the icon button's tooltip description.

props.name: tooltipDirection
props.description: Direction for the icon button tooltip.

props.name: keybindingHint
props.description: Keybinding hint rendered in the icon button tooltip.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Provides a disabled state for the button. The button will remain focusable, and have `aria-disabled` applied.

props.name: variant
props.description: Determines the styles on a button, one of 'default' | 'primary' | 'invisible' | 'danger' | 'link'

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the button and fontSize of the text in the button

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables a button. Avoid disabling buttons because it will make them inaccessible to users who rely on keyboard navigation. Buttons that are disabled cannot be clicked, selected, or navigated through.

props.name: block
props.description: Allow a button to fill its container horizontally

props.name: loading
props.description: Specify whether the button is in a loading state

props.name: loadingAnnouncement
props.description: The content to announce to screen readers when loading

props.name: inactive
props.description: Whether the button looks visually disabled, but can still accept all the same interactions as an enabled button.

props.name: labelWrap
props.description: Whether the button label should wrap to multiple lines if it is longer than the button width

props.name: unsafeDisableTooltip
props.description: Disable the default tooltip for the icon button.

props.name: description
props.description: Text used as the icon button's tooltip description.

props.name: tooltipDirection
props.description: Direction for the icon button tooltip.

props.name: keybindingHint
props.description: Keybinding hint rendered in the icon button tooltip.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for the menu button.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon for the menu button.

props.name: items
props.description: Items to render in the menu.

props.name: overflowIcon
props.description: Icon displayed when the menu item is within the overflow menu. If 'none' is provided, no icon will be shown in the overflow menu.

props.name: returnFocusRef
props.description: Target element to return focus to when the menu is closed.
